summary: Web project with a logo area. User wants the logo background changed from a mosaic/white style to a bluish color.

existing_features.title: Change the logo background in the Header component from the current mosaic/white style to a bluish color. Replace any white, light, or mosaic-patterned background behind the logo with a deep or medium blue tone (e.g., a solid or subtle gradient blue such as #1a3a6b or a cosmic blue hue) that complements the existing dark cosmic theme of the app.

new_feature_requests.summary: Change logo background from mosaic/white to a bluish color
